# CBAMValid — Exporter Verification Preparation Pack

> CBAMValid is an independent software service assisting non-EU exporters and EU importers in preparing verification-ready dossiers. The platform automatically verifies data compliance, links primary document evidence, and generates locked exporter declarations.

## Compliance Software & Tools
- [CBAM Exporter Software](https://cbamvalid.com/product): Link utility bills, invoices, activity data, and map manufacturing system boundaries.
- [Pricing Packages](https://cbamvalid.com/pricing): Unlock the 23-component verification readiness package and obtain 5 sealed dossier releases.
- [CBAM Certificate Verification](https://cbamvalid.com/verify): Verify the cryptographic seal integrity, active state, and audit trail of generated dossiers.
- [CBAM CN-Code Scope Hub](https://cbamvalid.com/cn-code): Verify if your imported products fall within the scope of the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism.

## Methodologies & Guides
- [CBAM Calculation Methodology](https://cbamvalid.com/methodology): Learn our deterministic calculation rules for direct and indirect embedded emissions under the EU regulation.
- [CBAM Dossier Workflow Guide](https://cbamvalid.com/how-it-works): Walk through each stage of the case preparation from data entry to cryptographic sealing.
- [Sample CBAM Compliance Dossier](https://cbamvalid.com/sample-dossier): Review a complete fictional demonstration dossier before purchasing credits.

## About & Legal
- [About CBAMValid](https://cbamvalid.com/about): Meet the team behind our independent compliance verification preparation tool.
- [Contact Support](https://cbamvalid.com/contact): Get technical support and billing inquiries regarding your CBAM evidence packages.
- [Terms of Service](https://cbamvalid.com/terms): Read the usage agreements governing calculations and report generation.
- [Privacy Notice](https://cbamvalid.com/privacy): Understand data handling security rules for your compliance evidence files.

## About
CBAMValid is operated under European Union privacy and data standards. Last updated: 2026-07-17T21:54:00Z.
